'''yadhaya''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:ibex|ibex]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-dh-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ibex|ibex]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| yadhaya
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:yædhæyæth|yædhæyæth]] || [[word:yædhæyæj|yædhæyæj]] || [[word:yædhæyæsh|yædhæyæsh]] || [[word:yædhæyæ|yædhæyæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:yadhadhayath|yadhadhayath]] || [[word:yadhadhayaj|yadhadhayaj]] || [[word:yadhadhayash|yadhadhayash]] || [[word:yadhadhaya|yadhadhaya]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:yadhayath|yadhayath]] || [[word:yadhayaj|yadhayaj]] || [[word:yadhayash|yadhayash]] || [[word:yadhaya|yadhaya]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:yadhafyath|yadhafyath]] || [[word:yadhafyaj|yadhafyaj]] || [[word:yadhafyash|yadhafyash]] || [[word:yadhafyaf|yadhafyaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:yadhayatha|yadhayatha]] || [[word:yadhayaja|yadhayaja]] || [[word:yadhayasha|yadhayasha]] || [[word:yadhayaka|yadhayaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:yadhayath|yadhayath]] || [[word:yadhayaj|yadhayaj]] || [[word:yadhayash|yadhayash]] || [[word:yadhaya|yadhaya]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:yadhayathal|yadhayathal]] || [[word:yadhayajal|yadhayajal]] || [[word:yadhayashal|yadhayashal]] || [[word:yadhayakal|yadhayakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:yadhayathatha|yadhayathatha]] || [[word:yadhayajaja|yadhayajaja]] || [[word:yadhayashasha|yadhayashasha]] || [[word:yadhayaka|yadhayaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:yadhayathan|yadhayathan]] || [[word:yadhayajan|yadhayajan]] || [[word:yadhayashan|yadhayashan]] || [[word:yadhayakan|yadhayakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:yadhayathaoro|yadhayathaoro]] || [[word:yadhayajaoro|yadhayajaoro]] || [[word:yadhayashaoro|yadhayashaoro]] || [[word:yadhayakaoro|yadhayakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|66806d6}}
